build.beforeBuildCommand: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; xattr -cr src-tauri/ 2>/dev/null || true; BINARIES_DIR="src-tauri/binaries"; TARGET_TRIPLE="$(rustc --print host-tuple)"; SIDECAR_NAME="music-dl-server-${TARGET_TRIPLE}"; SPEC_FILE="build/pyinstaller/music-dl-server.spec"; rm -rf "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}"/_MEI* 2>/dev/null || true; .venv/bin/pyinstaller --clean --distpath "$BINARIES_DIR" --workpath build/pyinstaller --noconfirm "$SPEC_FILE"; mv "$BINARIES_DIR/music-dl-server" "$BINARIES_DIR/${SIDECAR_NAME}"; echo "[verify] Checking bundled assets..."; .venv/bin/python -c "from pathlib import Path; js=(Path(\"tidal_dl/gui/static/app.js\")).read_text(); assert \"mediaSession\" in js, \"STALE JS: mediaSession missing\"; assert \"_wfHires\" in js, \"STALE JS: waveform hires missing\"; assert \"Continue Listening\" in js, \"STALE JS: Continue Listening missing\"; assert \"Smart Shuffle\" in js, \"STALE JS: Smart Shuffle missing\"; assert \"_libraryAlbumCache\" in js, \"STALE JS: album cache missing\"; print(\"[verify] Static assets OK\")"'
